name: Connectivity POP
description: The Connectivity POP is intended to re-connect the input's points with a set of new primitives, similar to what the [[Grid POP]] or [[Torus POP]] does to their sets of points. It works on any POP, especially those that ore organized as multi-[[Dimension]]s, that is, having rows, columns, slices and any number of dimensions. Like the Grid POP you can connect the points in any dimension with line strips, or in any two dimensions with meshes of triangles or quads, or leave them as point primitives or no primitives. It generally takes care of the incoming POP's arrangements points, and also offers more kinds of line strip connections, like zig-zag or spiral connections of points. See also [[Torus POP]], [[Dimension POP]], [[Dimension]], [[Grid POP]], [[Plane POP]]

parameters.name: Connectivity
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: Determines the primitive used to connect the points.

parameters.name: (First) Dimension Index
parameters.label: (First) Dimension Index
parameters.description: Select the dimension index. For modes requiring two dimensions, selects the first dimension index.

parameters.label: Second Dimension Index
parameters.description: Dimension index to the second dimension.

parameters.label: (First) Dimension Closed
parameters.description: Enable wrapping on the first dimension.

parameters.name: Second Dimension Closed
parameters.label: Second Dimension Closed
parameters.description: Enable wrapping on the second dimension.

parameters.name: Reorder Points by Prim/Vertex Order
parameters.label: Reorder Points by Prim/Vertex Order
parameters.description: Reorder points by primitive or vertex reference order.
